2004 will be better than 2003 for India! – by K Gopalakrishnan
Wednesday, 31 December, 2003, 11:03
The antara (sub sub period) will bring in more killing and escalation of border
tensions with Pakistan!
Relationship with Pakistan
The border tensions and terrorism will continue with Pakistan. The tensions will only
be mild, and there WON’T be any major wars happening. This tension is due to India
passing through the sub period of mercury, then kethu, followed by Venus till the year
end.

Future prediction- once the period of mercury is over, we
will have period of ketu which will bring in lot of
tensions and problems with Pakistan. 10 7 2008- 10 9
2009.
Till the period of mercury is over there will be no war
with Pakistan.
